columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not explicitly report the Progression-Free Survival (PFS) rate as a percentage for the treatment arm (ADT plus docetaxel). While the time to clinical progression is reported (Table 2), this is not the same as the PFS rate.

Not reported. The PDF does not explicitly report the Progression-Free Survival (PFS) rate as a percentage for the control arm (ADT alone). While the time to clinical progression is reported (Table 2), this is not the same as the PFS rate.
